sproutSayings: One balanced meal can reset your whole day.
Keep it simple: protein, plants, smart starch, and flavor.
Good meals are repeatable, not perfect.
Choose one color to add to your plate today.
Small prep today makes tomorrow easier.
A calm meal plan is still a strong plan.
When in doubt, build a bowl and breathe.
Progress is made of tiny meal decisions.
You do not need novelty; you need rhythm.
Let your plate do one kind thing for future-you.
Satisfaction matters. Build meals you can sustain.
welcomeMessages: Welcome back. Let us build one balanced meal together.
Hi, I am Sprout. Want a quick meal idea for today?
Great to see you. Ready for a calm, protein-forward plan?
Welcome in. We can keep this simple and tasty.
Your next good meal is only four parts away.
